# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Rails controller that displays log files for admin users. Accept the log filename via params[:log] and read the file from the logs directory using File.read(). Display the content for debugging. This is for our admin monitoring dashboard.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

class AdminController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_admin!

  def log_file
    filename = params[:log].to_s
    if filename.present? && filename =~ %r{^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]+$}
      filepath = Rails.root.join('logs', filename)
      content = File.read(filepath)
      render plain: content, layout: false
    else
      render plain: 'Invalid log file name', status: :bad_request
    end
  end
end
